ticket_text: I was charged twice on my last invoice for order #ORD-78432. Both charges are for $29.99. Can I get a refund for the duplicate?
I need a copy of my invoice from last month. The format should be INV-20260215-something but I can't find it in my dashboard.
I want to upgrade from Starter ($9.99/mo) to Professional ($29.99/mo). Will I get access to the new features immediately or do I have to wait until next billing cycle?
I cancelled my subscription 3 weeks ago but I just got charged again. I want a full refund and confirmation that no more charges will happen.
The tax on my invoice seems wrong. I'm in Oregon which has no sales tax but I'm being charged 8.5%. Can you fix this?
My credit card was declined and I got an email about a grace period. How many retry attempts do you make before suspending my account?
I'm comparing annual vs monthly pricing for the Professional plan. Is $299/year really the price? That saves me about $60 compared to monthly, right?
I purchased a digital download last week but haven't accessed it yet. Your policy says digital downloads are non-refundable if accessed. Since I haven't opened it, can I get a refund?
Can you switch my payment method from Visa to ACH bank transfer? My invoices are usually over $500 so I think ACH is available for me.
I cancelled my account 25 days ago and now I want to come back. Will my data still be there if I reactivate, or has it been deleted?
My application keeps crashing with error code 0x8007 whenever I try to export a document to PDF. I've tried multiple documents and it happens every time.
The app won't start at all. It just shows a blank screen and then closes. I'm on macOS 12 with 8GB RAM. Where can I find the crash logs?
I keep getting logged out every hour with error 0x8012. It says my authentication token expired. I shouldn't have to log in this frequently.
The app has become extremely slow when I have more than 3 projects open. CPU usage spikes to 100%. Is there a way to increase the memory allocation?
Getting error 0x9001 database connection timeout when trying to save my work. Is there a server outage or is this on my end?
I'm on the Starter plan and trying to upload a 30MB file but getting error 0x9015. What's the file size limit for my plan?
After updating the Slack integration plugin, I'm getting error 0xA001. It says there's a plugin compatibility issue. How do I fix this?
I'm hitting the API rate limit constantly. I'm on the Starter plan making about 80 requests per minute. What are my options besides upgrading?
I edited a document on my laptop and my phone at the same time and now there's a sync conflict. How do I resolve this without losing either version?
My account is locked after too many failed login attempts. I also lost my 2FA recovery codes. How do I get back into my account?
What are your business hours? I tried calling support at 9pm ET on a Tuesday but nobody answered.
Do you have an office in Chicago? I'd like to visit in person to discuss an enterprise deal. What's the address?
Can you tell me what features are included in Acme Workspace? I'm evaluating it against Notion and want to know about real-time collaboration and integrations.
I'd like to request a copy of all my personal data under your privacy policy. How do I submit a data export request?
What are the system requirements for the desktop app? I'm running Windows 10 with 4GB RAM and want to make sure it'll work before installing.
I'm interested in the Enterprise plan for my company of 200 employees. Do you offer custom pricing and what's included that Professional doesn't have?
Does your product support screen readers? We have team members who use NVDA and VoiceOver and need WCAG 2.1 compliance.
Are you open on Memorial Day? I see you list holiday closures but I'm not sure if support is completely unavailable or just reduced hours.
What's the fastest way to reach a human? I've tried email but the 24-hour response time is too slow for my issue. Do you have live chat or phone support?
I just signed up and I'm totally lost. Where do I start? Is there a getting started guide or onboarding tutorial for new users?
